briefdescription.para: Symbol indicating whether CONFIGNVR.PAGE[n] registers have upper part of NVR page read and write protection fields.
Symbol indicating whether CONFIGNVR.PAGE[n] registers have lower part of NVR page read and write protection fields.
Symbol indicating whether the CONFIG register has a DISABLEECC field.
Symbol indicating whether the POWER_MASK register has a VREFVPR field.
Symbol indicating whether the WAITSTATES register has a RDY field.
Symbol indicating whether the POWER_MASK register is present.
Maximum timeout value for entering read mode in MRAMC clock cycles.
MRAM word size in bytes.
Maximum value of waitstate number.
Maximum timeout value for waiting for next write in in MRAMC clock cycles.
Default timeout value for waiting for next write in in MRAMC clock cycles.
Minimum timeout value for low average current read in MRAMC clock cycles.
Minimum timeout value for low average current write in MRAMC clock cycles.
Minimum timeout value for low average current erase in MRAMC clock cycles.
Maximum timeout value for low average current read in MRAMC clock cycles.
Maximum timeout value for low average current write in MRAMC clock cycles.
Maximum timeout value for low average current erase in MRAMC clock cycles.
Minimum timeout value for automatic power down in MRAMC clock cycles.
Maximum timeout value for automatic power down in MRAMC clock cycles.
Minimum size of erase operation in MRAM words.
Maximum size of erase operation in MRAM words.
Maximum number of NVR pages.
Minimum size of lower 2KB memory in NR page to disable read access.
Minimum size of lower 2KB memory in NR page to disable write access.
Maximum size of lower 2KB memory in NR page to disable read access.
Maximum size of lower 2KB memory in NR page to disable write access.
Current operation is completed.
Ready to accept a new write operation.
ECC error detected but not corrected.
ECC error detected and corrected.
MRAM trim configuration request. The MRAMC is ready for the MRAM trim configuration.
MRAM access error.
MRAMC events.
Interrupt on READY event.
Interrupt on READYNEXT event.
Interrupt on ECCERROR event.
Interrupt on ECCERRORCORR event.
Interrupt on TRIMCONFIGREQ event.
Interrupt on ACCESSERR event.

enumvalue.name: NRF_MRAMC_ALL_INTS_MASK
enumvalue.initializer: = MRAMC_INTENSET_READY_Msk | MRAMC_INTENSET_READYNEXT_Msk | MRAMC_INTENSET_ECCERROR_Msk | MRAMC_INTENSET_ECCERRORCORR_Msk | MRAMC_INTENSET_TRIMCONFIGREQ_Msk | MRAMC_INTENSET_ACCESSERR_Msk

briefdescription.para: All MRAMC interrupts.
MRAMC interrupts.
Write is disabled.
Normal write is enabled.
Direct write is enabled.
Write enable (WEN) settings.
Erase is disabled but read is allowed.
Erase page and read are allowed.
Erase word and read are allowed.
Erase enable (EEN) settings.
No change in power mode.
Triggers power-up sequence.
Initiates power-down sequence.
Initiates power-down sequence with trim retained.
Power mode settings.
MRAM is OFF.
MRAM power-up sequence is active.
Request for the MRAM trim configuration.
Waiting for the MRAM trim configuration to complete.
The MRAM trim configuration to completed (This is momentary state).
MRAM is in standby mode.
MRAM power-down sequence is active.
MRAM is OFF with trim configuration in retain.
Power mode status.
Read: Trim configuration is unknown.
Read: Trim configuration data write is completed.
Trim configuration is completed - values for read operation.
Function for clearing the specified MRAMC event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the peripheral register structure.
Event to clear.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the state of the MRAMC event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to be checked.
The event has been generated.
The event has not been generated.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the address of the specified MRAMC event register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the peripheral register structure.
Requested event.

simplesect.para: Address of the specified event register.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the peripheral register structure.
Mask of interrupts to be enabled. Use nrf_mramc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the peripheral register structure.
Mask of interrupts to be disabled. Use nrf_mramc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the specified interrupts are enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be checked. Use nrf_mramc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

simplesect.para: Mask of enabled interrupts.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the state of pending interrupts.

simplesect.para: States of pending interrupt are saved as a bitmask. One set at particular position means that interrupt for event is pending.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Bitmask with information about pending interrupts. Use nrf_mramc_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking current MRAMC operation status.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Current operation is completed and MRAMC is ready.
MRAMC is busy.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking READYNEXT register status.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
MRAMC is ready to accept a new write operation.
MRAMC cannot accept any write operation now.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting Error Correction Code (ECC) information.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the data structure to be filled with ECC information.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing flag indicating detected error which could not be corrected.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing flag indicating detected error which was corrected.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the MRAMC peripheral configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure containing configuration to be set.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the MRAMC peripheral configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure to be filled with MRAMC configuration data.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the timeout value for automatic read mode.

simplesect.para: The timeout value is number of MRAMC clock cycles. This feature is disabled when the value is 0. The CONFIG is updated on timeout. Timeout value must be in range: 0-4095.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Timeout value.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the timeout value for automatic read mode.

simplesect.para: The timeout value is number of MRAMC clock cycles. This feature is disabled when the value is 0.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Timeout value.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting wait states for MRAM read access.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure filled with information about waitstates for MRAM read access.

briefdescription.para: Function for reading wait states for MRAM read access.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the data structure to be filled with waitstates information for MRAM read access.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting preload timeout value for waiting for a next write.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure filled with information about$ preload timeout value.

briefdescription.para: Function for reading preload timeout value for waiting for a next write.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure to be filled with information about preload timeout value.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting preload timeout value for low average current in case of read, write and erase.

simplesect.para: The timeout value is number of MRAMC clock cycles, feature is disabled when the value is 0.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure filled with information about preload timeout value for average current in case of read, write, and errase operation.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting preload timeout value for low average current in case of read, write and erase.

simplesect.para: The timeout value is number of MRAMC clock cycles, feature is disabled when the value is 0.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure to be filled with information about preload timeout value for average current in case of read, write, and errase operation.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting power-up/down sequence.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Power init mode.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting power-up/down sequence.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Power init mode.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting automatic power-down feature using the inactive time period of MRAM.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure filled with information about power-down feature configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting automatic power-down feature using the inactive time period of MRAM.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure to be filled with information about power-down feature configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting mask for the various voltages supplies when initiating power-up/down.

simplesect.para: All bits must be set to 0 for normal operation of MRAM. Incorrect usage would result in unknown behavior of MRAM.
Do not use this function unless you know the consequences.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure filled with information about various voltages supplies when initiating power-up/down.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting mask for the various voltages supplies when initiating power-up/down.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure to be filled with information about various voltages supplies when initiating power-up/down.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the power mode status.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Status of the power mode.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting status of the power control signals acknowledgement during power-up sequence.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure to be filled with information about status of the power control signals acknowledgement during power-up sequence.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting status of the power control signals acknowledgement during power-down sequence.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure to be filled with information about status of the power control signals acknowledgement during power-down sequence.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the configuration of force ON signal of the power supply.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure filled with information about force ON power supply.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting force ON the power supply.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure to be filled with information about force ON power supply.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting force OFF the power supply.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure filled with information about force OFF power supply.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting force OFF the power supply.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure to be filled with information about force OFF power supply.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting data to be written to the MRAM trim configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Data to be written to the MRAM trim configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting data written to the MRAM trim configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Data written to the MRAM trim configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting data read from the MRAM trim configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Data read from the MRAM trim configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting number of bits in the current data to be written to and read from the trim configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Number of bits to be written.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting number of bits in the current data to be written to and read from the trim configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Number of bits to be written.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting start shifting data for trim configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting start shifting data for trim configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Start trim config.
No operation.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting status of shifting the MRAM trim configuration data.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Ready for shifting the next MRAM trim configuration data.
Shifting the MRAM trim configuration data is in progress.

briefdescription.para: Function for indicating to the MRAMC that the whole MRAM trim configuration data write is completed.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting trim configuration data status.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Trim configuration status.

briefdescription.para: Function for erasing a 32-bit word in the MRAM main block.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Address of the word that needs to be erased in the MRAM.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting address of word in the MRAM main block to be erased.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Address of the word.

briefdescription.para: Function for erasing an area in the MRAM main block.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Start address of the area that needs to be erased in the MRAM.
Number of MRAM words to be erased.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting address and size of the area to be erased in the MRAM main block.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the address of the area.
Pointer to the number of MRAM words to be erased.

briefdescription.para: Function for erasing erasing whole MRAM main block and the first NVR page.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting ERASE.ERASEALL register value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Start erase of chip.
No operation.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the eraseword lock status.

simplesect.para: When the lock is enabled, the write to the corresponding erase register is ignored, it remains enabled until the next reset cycle.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Set true to enable or false to disable a lock.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the eraseword lock status.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Lock enabled.
Lock disabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the erasearea lock status.

simplesect.para: When the lock is enabled, the write to the corresponding erase register is ignored, it remains enabled until the next reset cycle.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Set true to enable or false to disable a lock.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the erasearea lock status.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Lock enabled.
Lock disabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the eraseall lock status.

simplesect.para: When the lock is enabled, the write to the corresponding erase register is ignored, it remains enabled until the next reset cycle.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Set true to enable or false to disable a lock.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the eraseall lock status.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Lock enabled.
Lock disabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for configuring the specified NVR page.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the settings data.
Page number [0...3].

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the configuring of the specified NVR page.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the settings data.
Page number [0...3].
